title: 广州版五年级上册英语

sentences.en: How do you learn English words?
I like to learn words in chunks.
sentences.zh: 我喜欢把单词放在短语中学习。

sentences.en: I find it useful to make word cards.
sentences.zh: 我觉得制作单词卡很有用。

sentences.en: It helps me to remember words.
Every time I ..., I ...
What should I do?

chunks.zh: 把单词放在词组里学习

dialogues.speaker: Lucas
dialogues.en: Nikki, how do you learn new words?
dialogues.zh: 妮基，你是怎么学新单词的？

dialogues.speaker: Nikki
dialogues.en: I like to learn words in chunks.
dialogues.zh: 我喜欢把单词放在词组里学习。

dialogues.speaker: Lucas
dialogues.en: What is a chunk?
dialogues.zh: 什么是词组？

dialogues.speaker: Nikki
dialogues.en: It's a group of words, like "join a club". It helps you remember words more easily.
dialogues.zh: 它是一组单词，比如「join a club」。它能帮助你更容易记住单词。

dialogues.speaker: Lucas
dialogues.en: Sounds fun! I'm going to try it at home. Thanks, Nikki!
dialogues.zh: 听起来很有趣！我要回家试试。谢谢你，妮基！

reading.title: Unit 1 课文
paragraphs: Task A: Here are some ways to remember words faster.
look them up in the dictionary
Is learning new words hard? Try these tips.
1. Learn words in chunks — Chunks help you remember words more easily. For example, remember "strong wind" instead of just "wind". You can also make word cards with pictures.
2. Put chunks together to make sentences — Try to use chunks in your speaking and writing. For example, "Can you please turn on the lights?"
3. Learn a little every day — Spend ten to twenty minutes reading English books every day. Keep your word cards with you and look at them often.

units.title: What Club Are You Going to Join?

sentences.en: Which club are you going to join?
sentences.zh: 你打算加入哪个俱乐部？

sentences.en: I'm going to join the football club.
sentences.zh: 我打算加入足球俱乐部。

sentences.en: It can help me grow taller and stronger.
sentences.zh: 它能帮助我长得更高更强壮。

sentences.en: Are you going to join a club?
Yes, I am. / No, I'm not.
sentences.zh: 是的，我打算。/ 不，我不打算。

dialogues.speaker: Sam
dialogues.en: Hey, Aiwen! The club fair is coming!
dialogues.zh: 嘿，艾文！社团博览会快来了！

dialogues.speaker: Aiwen
dialogues.en: Yeah! Which club are you going to join?
dialogues.zh: 是啊！你打算加入哪个社团？

dialogues.speaker: Sam
dialogues.en: I'm going to join the football club. It can help me grow taller and stronger. What about you?
dialogues.zh: 我打算加入足球俱乐部。它能帮助我长得更高更强壮。你呢？

dialogues.speaker: Aiwen
dialogues.en: I am going to join the science club.
dialogues.zh: 我打算加入科学俱乐部。

dialogues.speaker: Sam
dialogues.en: That's great!
dialogues.zh: 太棒了！

reading.title: Unit 2 课文
paragraphs: Task A: The club fair is coming! What are Sam's thoughts about the clubs?
have better writing and speaking skills
Speech Club: We give you a new way to share your ideas and a chance to become a great speaker. Come on time and speak up! Wed. 4:00 – 5:00 p.m.
AI and Robots Club: Are you interested in AI and robots? Do you like trying new things? Join us and have great fun! Just bring an open mind. Tue. & Thurs. 3:40 – 5:00 p.m.
Football Club: Do you want to run faster and get stronger? Join our team and make new friends! Mon., Wed., & Fri. after school. Please wear sports shoes.
Dance Club: Do you want to learn how to tell a story with your body? This is the right place! Mon. & Wed. 3:00 – 5:00 p.m. Please bring your dance shoes and clothes.

sentences.en: What's wrong?
How are you feeling now?
Cheer up! Be happy!
I'm here for you.
I'm sorry to hear that.
It's no big deal.
Do you want to talk about it?
Are you feeling better now?
sentences.zh: 你现在感觉好一些了吗？

chunks.en: Just go and get some food

dialogues.speaker: Yafei
dialogues.en: Hey, Sam. You look sad.
dialogues.zh: 嘿，山姆。你看起来很难过。

dialogues.speaker: Sam
dialogues.en: We lost the game today.
dialogues.zh: 我们今天输了比赛。

dialogues.speaker: Yafei
dialogues.en: I'm sorry to hear that. I know how you feel.
dialogues.zh: 很遗憾听到这个消息。我理解你的感受。

dialogues.speaker: Sam
dialogues.en: I can't believe it. We played so well.
dialogues.zh: 我不敢相信。我们打得那么好。

dialogues.speaker: Yafei
dialogues.en: That must be hard. How about we get something to eat?
dialogues.zh: 那一定很难受。我们去吃点东西怎么样？

dialogues.speaker: Sam
dialogues.en: OK.
dialogues.zh: 好的。

reading.title: Unit 3 课文
paragraphs: Task A: When your friends are down, what do you say to them?
How are you feeling now? Do you want to talk about it?
What's wrong? I'm here if you want to talk.
Lucas: You are sad again, Alice?
Alice: Chinese is so difficult. I want to give up.
Lucas: How can you think it's hard? It's not!
Alice: Maybe I'm just bad at it.
Lucas: You worry too much. It's not a big deal!
Mulan: Alice, you look sad. Do you want to talk?
Alice: Chinese is so difficult. I want to give up.
Mulan: I have a hard time learning English. I know how you feel.
Alice: I just keep forgetting words.
Mulan: Me, too! We can study together. I can teach you Chinese, and you can teach me English.
Alice: Sounds good! Thanks, Mulan! I feel better now.

sentences.en: A typhoon will come on Friday.
I'll turn off the lights.
You'll need to close the windows.
Please remember to stay indoors.
Make sure you bring everything inside.
sentences.zh: 确保把所有东西搬到室内。

sentences.en: If you happen to be outside, ...
You'll want to find a safe place.
sentences.zh: 你会想找一个安全的地方。

dialogues.speaker: Nikki
dialogues.en: A typhoon is coming tomorrow!
dialogues.zh: 明天有台风要来了！

dialogues.speaker: Yafei
dialogues.en: Don't worry. Just close the windows to keep out the strong wind.
dialogues.zh: 别担心。只需关上窗户挡住大风。

dialogues.speaker: Nikki
dialogues.en: Okay. Anything else I should do?
dialogues.zh: 好的。还有什么我该做的吗？

dialogues.speaker: Yafei
dialogues.en: You'll also need to turn off the lights. Oh! Don't forget to bring everything inside.
dialogues.zh: 你还需要关掉电灯。哦！别忘了把所有东西都搬进来。

dialogues.speaker: Nikki
dialogues.en: Thanks! I'll keep that in mind.
dialogues.zh: 谢谢！我会记住的。

reading.title: Unit 4 课文
paragraphs: Task A: A typhoon is coming. What should you do?
Good morning, everyone! Welcome to today's weather report. Typhoon Haitang is coming on Saturday afternoon. Please follow these tips.
During a typhoon, try to stay indoors. Bring everything inside, and close your windows. Also, turn off your lights and TV.

If you happen to be outside, get to a safe place quickly. Stay away from trees! Watch your step and don't run. Wear a colourful raincoat so others can see you. Remember, a raincoat is better than an umbrella.

units.title: What Will the Weather Be Like?

sentences.en: Will it be sunny tomorrow?
Yes, it will. / No, it won't.
sentences.zh: 是的，会的。/ 不，不会的。

sentences.en: Will I need winter trousers?
It will be windy tomorrow.
The temperature will be high/low.
Hello, this is ... May I speak to ...?

dialogues.speaker: Mum
dialogues.en: Lucas, how's your packing going?
dialogues.zh: 卢卡斯，你收拾行李收拾得怎么样了？

dialogues.speaker: Lucas
dialogues.en: It's getting cold in Harbin. Will I need to pack a lot of clothes?
dialogues.zh: 哈尔滨很冷。我需要带很多衣服吗？

dialogues.speaker: Mum
dialogues.en: One warm coat and some winter trousers will do. You'll also need some light sweaters and a pair of warm shoes.
dialogues.zh: 一件厚外套和几条冬裤就够了。你还需要带几件薄毛衣和一双保暖的鞋。

dialogues.speaker: Lucas
dialogues.en: OK. I'll also need some socks.
dialogues.zh: 好的。我还需要带一些袜子。

reading.title: Unit 5 课文
paragraphs: Task A: We wear different clothes in different weather.
−10°C (ten degrees below zero): coat, a pair of winter trousers
10°C to 20°C (ten to twenty degrees): sweater, a pair of jeans
30°C (thirty degrees): cap, T-shirt, skirt, a pair of shorts
Friday is going to be a cloudy day. The temperature goes between six below zero and three degrees. Winter trousers and a warm coat will be a must on Friday!
Strong winds will come on Saturday. The lowest temperature will be ten below zero, and the highest will be three below zero. Bring a winter hat and a scarf to keep warm when you go out.
Sunday will be a bit warmer and sunny. The highest temperature will be one degree and the lowest seven below zero.

units.title: What Will You Do in Space?

sentences.en: What will I do in space?
Where will I stay in space?
How will I eat in space?
When will we travel to space?
sentences.zh: 我们什么时候去太空旅行？

sentences.en: You'll see ...
You'll get to ...
We can ... in ... However, we can't do that in ...
sentences.zh: 我们可以在……做……，但是在……不能。

dialogues.speaker: Nikki
dialogues.en: Hi, Yiming! What will you do if you can travel to space?
dialogues.zh: 嗨，一鸣！如果你能去太空旅行，你会做什么？

dialogues.speaker: Yiming
dialogues.en: I would like to try space food! What will you do?
dialogues.zh: 我想尝尝太空食品！你会做什么？

dialogues.speaker: Nikki
dialogues.en: I'll go on a spacewalk!
dialogues.zh: 我会去太空漫步！

dialogues.speaker: Yiming
dialogues.en: That sounds cool!
dialogues.zh: 听起来很酷！

dialogues.speaker: Nikki
dialogues.en: We could also talk to astronauts from other countries.
dialogues.zh: 我们还可以和其他国家的宇航员交流。

dialogues.speaker: Yiming
dialogues.en: Haha, I will teach them Chinese!
dialogues.zh: 哈哈，我会教他们说中文！

reading.title: Unit 6 课文
paragraphs: Task A: Do you know what astronauts do in space?
Hi there, future space travellers! Ready for your first space trip? There are lots of things to do and see.
You will eat dried food and drink from bags. And in space, you will sleep in sleeping bags!
Then, you will work with your space robots and go on spacewalks. We will also show you our space farm. Cool, right?
By the way, do you like to watch the sunrise? In space, you can watch 16 sunrises every day! You can also see the moon and the stars.

units.title: Can You Make a Bird Feeder?

sentences.en: He will need to cut along the lines.
She will place it on a tree.
It'll keep food dry.
First, draw cutting lines on the bottle.
sentences.zh: 首先，在瓶子上画出剪切线。

sentences.en: Next, you will need to put some bird food into the bottle.
sentences.zh: 接下来，你需要把一些鸟食放进瓶子里。

sentences.en: Finally, find a tree to place it on.
sentences.zh: 最后，找一棵树把它放上去。

sentences.en: What do you think of this bird feeder?
sentences.zh: 你觉得这个喂鸟器怎么样？

dialogues.speaker: Nikki
dialogues.en: Hey, Yafei. Can you teach me how to make a bird feeder?
dialogues.zh: 嘿，亚飞。你能教我怎么做喂鸟器吗？

dialogues.speaker: Yafei
dialogues.en: Sure! First, draw cutting lines on the bottle, and then cut along the lines.
dialogues.zh: 当然！首先，在瓶子上画出裁剪线，然后沿线剪开。

dialogues.speaker: Nikki
dialogues.en: Okay, what's next?
dialogues.zh: 好的，然后呢？

dialogues.speaker: Yafei
dialogues.en: Next, you will need to put some bird food into the bottle.
dialogues.zh: 接下来，你需要往瓶子里放些鸟食。

dialogues.speaker: Nikki
dialogues.en: Okay.
dialogues.zh: 好的。

dialogues.speaker: Yafei
dialogues.en: Finally, find a tree to place it on.
dialogues.zh: 最后，找一棵树把它放上去。

dialogues.speaker: Nikki
dialogues.en: Thanks, Yafei.
dialogues.zh: 谢谢你，亚飞。

reading.title: Unit 7 课文
paragraphs: Task A: It's wintertime. Yafei is going to make a bird feeder. Look and order the steps.
Step 4: place it on a tree
Today, it is not easy for birds to find food. It is even more difficult during cold, snowy winters.

But you can make a bird feeder to help them. You only need to find a used plastic bottle. Then, cut a hole in the side of the bottle, put some food inside, and place the bottle on a tree. Birds will love your feeder!

There are different kinds of bird feeders. Some will keep food dry. Others will stay still on windy days or last for weeks. Make your own feeder and place it in a tree. Then, you'll have many new friends!
